title: Henningia parviflora
taxonomy: Henningia parviflora belongs to the family of plants known as Aizoaceae, which is a large and diverse family of succulents native to southern Africa. This classification places Henningia parviflora among other species that share similar characteristics and growth habits. The genus Henningia is further classified within the tribe Ruschieae, which consists of small, leafy succulents that thrive in arid environments.
